name: Home Style Jerky
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Round steak, cut in strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice round steak into strips about 4 inches long and 1/8 inch thick. (The slicing is easier if the steak is partially frozen.)
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 8 hours, stirring occasionally.
3. Thread the marinated strips onto bamboo skewers or toothpicks.
4. Place the skewered strips on a rack above a pan to catch drippings in an oven set to its lowest temperature (100-150°F).
5. Keep the door slightly open while the jerky dries for 8-10 hours.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool before enjoying.
